visual_description: A man with dark hair and a gold chain lies on his back on a gray floor, his head tilted up. He has a visible cut on his forehead with blood, and his eyes are open, looking upward. He is wearing a light blue collared shirt and a yellow jacket with dark stains on it.
audio_description: A loud, sharp cracking sound, like a whip or a sudden impact, is heard.
